name: hired-ai-root
description: Root package to manage Hired AI full stack application

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:resume-builder" "npm run start:heired-ai" "npm run start:python" "npm run start:ats" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:frontend: cd Frontend/HiredAI_RBConnected && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Frontend/HiredAI_RBConnected && npm install && cd ../../Backend/Models/suggestionapiconctd && pip install -r requirements_fullstack.txt || echo 'Make sure to install python requirements manually if this fails'
